notes: 28 JS modules reviewed. All 23 innerHTML uses are empty-string clears; no string-built HTML anywhere; PDF-derived content (metadata/search/toc/thumbnails/annotations) rendered via textContent/createElement. upload.js enforces ext+MIME+size(50MB)+empty+%PDF- magic. New modules insert-pages.js (MAX_INSERT=50) and page-resize.js are bounded, sanitize download filenames, XSS-safe. Live headers: full CSP, X-Frame-Options, Referrer-Policy, nosniff. nginx -t ok; .git/.bak/.sh/.md/path-traversal all 403. No external requests, no secrets, no failed SSH auth.
